Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT DAVID HO, LAURA HO, JEANNIE HO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
is DENIED. Moving party states no legal basis for expungement of a lis pendens in a fraudulent transfer of real property action.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
